creator: andy@neu.net
text:
After further research it seems that this problem is caused by having Compiz enabled.  Without Compiz enabled the sounds effects work as expected.  However with Compiz enabled the sound effects do not play through the speakers.  The procedure to reproduce is the same except Compiz needs to be enabled.  If the developer does not have the environment to reproduce I would be happy to test patches.

Changing subject line to:
